summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of SyncTech FlowOps autonomous quick-commerce dashboard. All core features working perfectly including live simulation, agent status tracking, inventory management, and real-time decision logging.
passed_tests: Header displays 'DarkOps Control Center' with system status
Stats bar shows all 4 metrics (Delivered, Delayed, Active Agents, Success Rate)
3 dark store cards with dynamic inventory progress bars
5 delivery agent cards with correct status badges
Agent status badge colors: green (active), yellow (idle), red (stuck)
Agent Decision Log with live entries for DEMAND, ROUTING, INVENTORY, ALERT types
Live order generation every 3 seconds confirmed
3-column grid layout responsive on desktop, tablet, and mobile
All data-testid attributes present for testing
